forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northwesterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, with possible small hail in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southerly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southerly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the late morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
